contents.title: Introduction
contents.description: A lightweight Vue 3 directive that provides silky-smooth touch scrolling for mobile tables.

children.value: vue-table-touch-scroll is a lightweight solution dedicated to bridging the gap between desktop tables and mobile touch interactions. With a simple directive, it ensures that any Vue PC table component delivers a native-grade, silky-smooth scrolling and interaction experience on mobile devices. This includes seamless out-of-the-box support for table components in mainstream UI libraries like Element Plus, Ant Design Vue, and Naive UI.
— Frame-rate normalized via Delta Time, eliminating speed differences across 60Hz/90Hz/120Hz screens for consistent inertia feel
— Automatically determines gesture intent, filters diagonal jitter, locks each gesture to a single axis
— Automatically yields control back to the browser when scrolling reaches boundaries, compatible with iOS swipe-back and other native behaviors
— Distinguishes between "user wants to click" and "user wants to brake", only blocks click events during high-speed inertia scrolling to prevent accidental taps
— Locks the active finger via Touch ID, preventing coordinate jumps caused by multi-finger alternation
— Only triggers rendering and event dispatching when scroll position actually changes, avoiding unnecessary overhead
— Built-in preset configurations for Element Plus, Ant Design Vue, Naive UI, VxeTable, and more
— Pure native implementation, no extra dependencies needed
VxeTable, Arco Design, PrimeVue, Vuetify table components
Any custom table that needs optimized mobile touch scrolling

props.code: npm install vue-table-touch-scroll
yarn add vue-table-touch-scroll
pnpm add vue-table-touch-scroll

import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import VueTableTouchScroll from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

const app = createApp(App)
app.use(VueTableTouchScroll)
app.mount('#app')

children.value: When using desktop Table components directly on mobile, you typically encounter these issues:
performs poorly in some UI libraries' nested table structures, causing sluggish or completely broken touch dragging
— No inertia scrolling after releasing, users must drag repeatedly to reach the target position
— Table header fails to sync when the body scrolls, causing visual misalignment
— Inertia distances differ between 60Hz and 120Hz screens, unable to provide a unified interaction experience
— Cannot trigger iOS swipe-back and other native browser behaviors after scrolling to boundaries
solves these problems by intercepting the touch event flow and implementing a complete scroll physics engine inside the directive. Here are the key approaches:

Uses sliding window sampling instead of traditional weighted averages, keeping only touch points from the last 50ms to calculate release velocity, fundamentally eliminating sampling jitter on low-end devices and over-dense sampling on high refresh rate screens:

props.code:
ctx.touchTracker = ctx.touchTracker.filter((p) => now - p.time <= 50)
const oldestPoint = ctx.touchTracker[0]
ctx.velocity = -(t.clientX - oldestPoint.x) / (now - oldestPoint.time)

children.value: Physics decay during inertia is normalized via Delta Time, ensuring the same swipe produces identical scroll distances on both 60Hz and 120Hz screens:

props.code:
const dt = Math.min(now - ctx.lastFrameTime, MAX_DT)
ctx.velocity *= ctx.friction ** (dt / 16.67)

children.value: Combined with dirty value detection, proactively dispatches
events to force immediate header synchronization, solving the visual tearing caused by asynchronous native
Automatically yields control when scrolling reaches container boundaries, ensuring native behaviors like iOS swipe-back are not blocked:

props.code:
const atLeft = el.scrollLeft <= 1 && dx > 0
const atRight = el.scrollLeft >= maxScrollLeft - 1 && dx < 0
if (atLeft || atRight) isAtEdge = true

children.value: html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}

children.value: If you don't need global registration, you can import the directive directly in a component:
For UI libraries with built-in presets, simply pass the
name — no need to manually find scroll container selectors:
For the full list of supported presets and their selectors, see
For UI libraries without built-in presets, use
to specify the scroll container inside the table:
. If both are provided, the element specified by
will be used. If neither is provided, the directive's bound element itself is used as the scroll container.
Adjust friction and drag threshold based on your use case:
<!-- Smoother: high friction (slow decay), low threshold -->
<!-- More precise: low friction (fast decay), high threshold -->
to completely disable the directive, useful for toggling based on device type:
// Scroll started: close overlays, record start time, etc.
// Scroll ended: trigger analytics, load more data, etc.

contents.title: Parameters
contents.description: API reference for Vue Table Touch Scroll

children.value: A Vue 3 custom directive that adds touch scroll support to table elements.
// After registration, use v-table-touch-scroll in templates

props.code: import { vTableTouchScroll } from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

children.value: Configuration options interface for the directive.
UI library preset name, automatically applies the corresponding scroll container selector
CSS selector for the target scroll element, takes priority over
Friction/decay rate. Higher = slower decay (smoother scrolling), lower = faster stop (range: 0.8 - 0.99)
Displacement threshold (px) before determining scroll direction, distinguishes minor jitter from intentional dragging
Whether to disable inertia scrolling. When
, scrolling stops immediately on finger release
Speed threshold (px/ms) for emergency stop click blocking. Higher = more lenient, lower = more strict (range: 0.3 - 1.0)
Callback fired when scrolling starts, after finger displacement exceeds
Callback fired when scrolling ends, after inertia animation fully stops

props.code:
interface TableTouchScrollOptions {
  enabled?: boolean
  preset?: TablePreset
  selector?: string
  friction?: number
  dragThreshold?: number
  disableInertia?: boolean
  clickBlockThreshold?: number
  onScrollStart?: () => void
  onScrollEnd?: () => void
}

children.value: Supported UI library preset types and their corresponding scroll container selectors.

props.code:
type TablePreset =
  | 'element-plus'
  | 'ant-design-vue'
  | 'arco-design'
  | 'naive-ui'
  | 'primevue'
  | 'vuetify'
  | 'vxe-table'

children.value: UI library selector preset mapping constant.
Get the corresponding CSS selector by preset name.
if the preset does not exist.
Physics engine constants used internally by the directive (not externally configurable):
Velocity threshold (px/ms) to stop inertia animation
Max frame interval limit (ms), prevents jumps after frame drops
Inertia protection delay (ms). If finger pauses longer than this before release, inertia is not triggered
Default speed threshold (px/ms) for emergency stop click blocking

contents.description: Using Vue Table Touch Scroll with other UI libraries or custom tables

children.value: Vue Table Touch Scroll supports Table components from all desktop Vue UI component libraries.
For libraries with built-in presets, see the
For libraries without built-in presets, use
to specify the actual scrollable container element inside the table. You'll need to use browser DevTools to find the CSS selector for the DOM element responsible for scrolling:
If you'd like to add built-in preset support for a UI library, feel free to submit an Issue or PR on

vue-table-touch-scroll is a lightweight interaction engine specifically designed to adapt Vue desktop table components for mobile devices. With perfect compatibility for major UI libraries like Element Plus, Ant Design Vue, and Vxe Table, it allows you to grant your PC tables native-grade, buttery-smooth mobile interaction experiences with just a single line of code.

contents.title: 介绍
contents.description: vue-table-touch-scroll 是一个轻量级解决方案，专门用于弥合 桌面表格组件 与 移动端触摸交互 之间的体验差距。通过一个简单的指令，它可以让任何 Vue PC 表格组件在移动设备上也能获得 接近原生级、丝滑流畅的滚动与交互体验。该方案开箱即用地支持主流 UI 库中的表格组件，例如：Element Plus、Ant Design Vue、Naive UI，让这些桌面端表格在移动端也能实现顺畅的触摸滚动体验。

children.value: vue-table-touch-scroll 是一个轻量级解决方案，专门用于弥合 桌面表格组件 与 移动端触摸交互 之间的体验差距。通过一个简单的指令，它可以让任何 Vue PC 表格组件在移动设备上也能获得 接近原生级、丝滑流畅的滚动与交互体验。该方案开箱即用地支持主流 UI 库中的表格组件，例如：Element Plus、Ant Design Vue、Naive UI，让这些桌面端表格在移动端也能实现顺畅的触摸滚动体验。
— 基于 Delta Time 的帧率归一化，消除 60Hz/90Hz/120Hz 屏幕的速度差异，提供一致的惯性体感
— 自动判定手势意图，过滤对角线抖动，每次手势只锁定在一个轴向
— 滚动触达边界时自动交还控制权给浏览器，兼容 iOS 侧滑返回等原生行为
— 区分"用户想点击"与"用户想刹车"，仅在高速惯性滚动时拦截点击事件，防止误触
— 通过 Touch ID 追踪锁定活跃手指，防止多指交替导致的坐标跳变
— 仅在滚动位置实际变化时触发渲染和事件派发，避免无效开销
— 内置 Element Plus、Ant Design Vue、Naive UI、VxeTable 等主流 UI 库的预设配置
— 纯原生实现，无需额外依赖
任何需要优化移动端触摸滚动的自定义表格

props.code: npm install vue-table-touch-scroll
yarn add vue-table-touch-scroll
pnpm add vue-table-touch-scroll

import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import VueTableTouchScroll from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

const app = createApp(App)
app.use(VueTableTouchScroll)
app.mount('#app')

children.value: 在移动端直接使用桌面端 Table 组件时，通常会遇到以下问题：
在部分 UI 库的表格嵌套结构中表现不佳，触摸拖拽时响应迟钝或完全无法滚动
— 松手后没有惯性滑动，用户需要反复拖拽才能到达目标位置
— 表体滚动时表头未能同步更新，产生视觉错位
— 60Hz 和 120Hz 屏幕上的惯性距离不一致，无法提供统一的交互体验
— 滚动到边界后无法触发 iOS 侧滑返回等浏览器原生行为
通过接管触摸事件流，在指令内部实现了一套完整的滚动物理引擎来解决上述问题。以下是几个核心方案：
采用滑动窗口采样替代传统的加权平均，仅保留最近 50ms 内的触摸点来计算松手速度，从根源上消除低端机采样抖动和高刷屏幕采样过密的影响：

props.code:
ctx.touchTracker = ctx.touchTracker.filter((p) => now - p.time <= 50)
const oldestPoint = ctx.touchTracker[0]
ctx.velocity = -(t.clientX - oldestPoint.x) / (now - oldestPoint.time)

children.value: 惯性阶段的物理衰减基于 Delta Time 归一化，使得同一次滑动在 60Hz 和 120Hz 屏幕上产生相同的滚动距离：

props.code:
const dt = Math.min(now - ctx.lastFrameTime, MAX_DT)
ctx.velocity *= ctx.friction ** (dt / 16.67)

children.value: 配合脏值检测，主动派发
事件强制表头即时同步，解决原生
当滚动触达容器边界时自动交还控制权，确保 iOS 侧滑返回等原生行为不被阻断：

props.code:
const atLeft = el.scrollLeft <= 1 && dx > 0
const atRight = el.scrollLeft >= maxScrollLeft - 1 && dx < 0
if (atLeft || atRight) isAtEdge = true

children.value: html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}

import { createApp } from 'vue'

import VueTableTouchScroll from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

app.use(VueTableTouchScroll)
app.mount('#app')

contents.title: 参数
contents.description: Vue Table Touch Scroll 的 API 参考文档

children.value: Vue 3 自定义指令，为表格元素添加触摸滚动支持。
// 注册后可在模板中使用 v-table-touch-scroll 指令

props.code: import { vTableTouchScroll } from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

children.value: UI 库预设名称，自动应用对应 UI 库的滚动容器选择器
目标滚动元素的 CSS 选择器，优先级高于
摩擦力/衰减率，值越大衰减越慢（滚动越丝滑），值越小即停感越强（建议范围：0.8 - 0.99）
判定滚动方向前的位移阈值 (px)，用于区分轻微抖动点击和有意识的拖拽
急停点击拦截的速度阈值 (px/ms)，值越大越宽松，值越小越严格（建议范围：0.3 - 1.0）
滚动开始回调，在用户手指位移超过
滚动结束回调，在惯性动画完全停止后触发

props.code:
interface TableTouchScrollOptions {
  enabled?: boolean
  preset?: TablePreset
  selector?: string
  friction?: number
  dragThreshold?: number
  disableInertia?: boolean
  clickBlockThreshold?: number
  onScrollStart?: () => void
  onScrollEnd?: () => void
}

children.value: 支持的 UI 库预设类型及对应的滚动容器选择器。

props.code:
type TablePreset =
  | 'element-plus'
  | 'ant-design-vue'
  | 'arco-design'
  | 'naive-ui'
  | 'primevue'
  | 'vuetify'
  | 'vxe-table'

children.value: UI 库选择器预设映射表常量。
根据预设名称获取对应的 CSS 选择器。
— 对应的 CSS 选择器，如果预设不存在则返回
指令内部使用的物理引擎常量（不可外部配置）：
停止惯性动画的速度阈值 (px/ms)
最大帧间隔限制 (ms)，防止掉帧后产生跳变
惯性保护延迟 (ms)，手指停顿超过此时间再松开则不触发惯性
急停点击拦截的默认速度阈值 (px/ms)

contents.title: 其他库
contents.description: 在其他 UI 库或自定义表格中使用 Vue Table Touch Scroll

children.value: Vue Table Touch Scroll 支持所有桌面端 Vue UI 组件库中的 Table 组件。
已内置预设的组件库请参阅
对于没有内置预设的组件库，可以通过
指定表格内部实际可滚动的容器元素。你需要通过浏览器开发者工具找到该表格组件中负责滚动的 DOM 元素的 CSS 选择器：
如果你希望为某个组件库添加内置预设支持，欢迎在
上提交 Issue 或 PR。

html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}
vue-table-touch-scroll 是一款专为 Vue 桌面端表格组件适配移动端所打造的轻量级交互扩展引擎。完美兼容 Element Plus、Ant Design Vue 与 Vxe Table 等主流组件库，只需一行代码，即可为 PC 端表格赋予在移动端原生级的丝滑交互体验。
